name: Stock Transfers

Can't be edited"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Received", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Stock has been received at the destination warehouse and added to the quantity on hand. Pending: un-commits stock from source and moves back to stock on hand."}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-42d7c282"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Staff Permissions"}], "data-id": "staff-permissions"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To use stock transfers staff users require the following permissions found in "}, {"text": "Access Control", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Stock Control", "bold": true}, {"text": ":"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Stock transfer read", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Allows the user to see stock transfers. They will not be able to add, update or process them."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Stock transfer write", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Allows the user to add, update and process stock transfers. Staff users will also need the "}, {"text": "Stock transfer read", "bold": true}, {"text": " permission to allow them to see the stock transfers as well."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Landed Costs and Average Cost Price Calculations"}], "data-id": "landed-costs-and-average-cost-price-calculations"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Landed costs are not recorded or accounted for when transferring stock between warehouses. They are only recorded when recieving a purchase order."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Average cost price is calculated at the time a stock transfer is received, based on the cost price when dispatched. If a purchase order has been received between a dispatch and receipt of a stock transfer, you may see an additional change to the average cost price when the transfer is received."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add a Stock Transfer"}], "data-id": "add-a-stock-transfer"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Stock transfers must be accurately recorded so that stock levels in your warehouses reflect the true values. To add a stock transfer:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "Stock Control", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Stock Transfers", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add stock transfer", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter the details of your stock transfer:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Field"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Source"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The warehouse you are transferring stock from. Cannot be a dropship warehouse."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Destination"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The warehouse you are transferring stock to.\u00a0Cannot be a dropship warehouse."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Additional notes"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Internal information about the stock transfer (optional)."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Expected dispatch date"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Date the source warehouse expects to send the stock (optional)."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Expected recieve date"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Date the destination warehouse expects to receive the stock (optional)."}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-35c9a1da"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Next", "bold": true}, {"text": " buton to add the products that are being transferred."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Once you click Next, the source and destination can no longer be edited. If these are incorrect, cancel the stock transfer and add a new one."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Product section, select the products that will be transferred. Search by entering the SKU or product name. After you've selected the product, click the "}, {"text": "Add Product", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Parent products, kit products, and service products cannot be added to a stock transfer."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Products are added to the stock transfer so you can see the amount of stock available in both warehouses. Enter the amount of stock to be transferred in the "}, {"text": "Transfer qty", "bold": true}, {"text": " field. You cannot transfer less than 1 unit, or more than the available qty in the source warehouse."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Repeat these steps untill all the products lines and stock amounts you wish to transfer have been added."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Please Note: Stock transfers are limited to 750 product lines."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Approve", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your stock transfer is now saved in "}, {"text": "Pending", "bold": true}, {"text": " status. Products and stock levels can still be edited in this status."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Dispatch a Stock Transfer"}], "data-id": "dispatch-a-stock-transfer"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When all stock has been added to the stock transfer you can pick the transfer lines and dispatch it. To dispatch your stock transfer:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "Stock Control", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Stock Transfers", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the stock transfer you want to dispatch."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Print", "bold": true}, {"text": " button at the top of the page, and select "}, {"text": "Print pick slip", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Pick and pack the items on the list, and arrange for dispatch."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Edit", "bold": true}, {"text": " button on the stock transfer and enter the tracking number."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Dispatch", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your stock transfer is now marked as dispatched, and cannot be edited any further."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Receive a Stock Transfer"}], "data-id": "receive-a-stock-transfer"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When stock arrives at the destination warehouse the stock transfer needs to be marked as received. To receive a stock transfer:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel, navigate to "}, {"text": "Stock Control", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Stock Transfers", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the stock transfer you want to receive."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Receive", "bold": true}, {"text": " button. All transfer lines will be recieved and added to warehouse stock."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "You can't receive a different quantity than what was dispatched. If the recieved amount is different, add an additional stock transfer or stock adjustment to update the stock levels to their correct amount."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add any additional notes and click the "}, {"text": "Receive stock transfer", "bold": true}, {"text": " button in the pop-up window that appears."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Print", "bold": true}, {"text": " button, and then click "}, {"text": "Print put-away sheet", "bold": true}, {"text": ". You can use this information to locate where in your warehouse received stock should be stored."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your stock transfer is received, and stock levels added to the destination warehouse."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Troubleshooting"}], "data-id": "troubleshooting"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You may encounter the below errors when creating and processing stock takes. Use the information below to resolve these errors:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This movement will generate a negative committed stock count of -1 for product \"xxxx\" at location \"xxx\".", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This error occurs when the product has a negative quantity, usually because too many have been picked on an order."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To resolve this issue:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Sales orders", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View orders", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Filter by the product SKU and the Pick Status "}, {"text": "Over Picked", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the order where too much stock has been picked and locate the over picked order line."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Hold or Edit Order", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and changes the status to "}, {"text": "Pick", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Correct the stock in the Pick field so that it matches the amount ordered."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Confirm the stock level of the warehouse is now correct. If this error is occuring and the product is not over picked please contact our support team."}]}]
